allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object Name, NumberOfCores, NumberOfLogicalProcessors | Format-List; "--- RAM ---"; [math]::Round\(\(Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem\).TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB,1\))

PowerShell("--- python ---"; try { python --version } catch { "python not on PATH" }; "--- ffmpeg ---"; $f = Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $f\) { "ffmpeg NOT FOUND" } else { $f.Source }; "--- ollama ---"; $o = Get-Command ollama -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $o\) { "ollama NOT FOUND on PATH" } else { $o.Source })

PowerShell("--- Vulkan runtime ---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:SystemRoot\\System32\\vulkan-1.dll"\) { "vulkan-1.dll present" } else { "vulkan-1.dll NOT found" }; $vi = Get-Command vulkaninfo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $vi\) { "vulkaninfo not on PATH" } else { $vi.Source }; "--- HIP SDK / ROCm ---"; if \(Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\AMD\\ROCm'\) { Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\AMD\\ROCm' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { "No ROCm/HIP SDK installed" })
PowerShell("--- all display adapters incl disabled ---")

PowerShell("--- contenido de .claude ---"; Get-ChildItem 'c:\\APLICACIONES\\audio_track\\.claude' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; "--- pip ---"; python -m pip --version; "--- node/npm ---"; try { "node $\(node --version\)" } catch { "node NOT FOUND" }; try { "npm $\(npm --version\)" } catch { "npm NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(cd C:\\APLICACIONES\\audio_track\\backend; .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install pytest httpx --quiet 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "--- pytest instalado ---"; $env:PYTHONWARNINGS='ignore'; .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest -q 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell(cd C:\\APLICACIONES\\audio_track\\backend; $env:PYTHONWARNINGS='ignore'; $sp='C:\\Users\\jague\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--APLICACIONES-audio-track\\4c7bf6aa-f267-4d79-ae9b-dc1ff3dfc722\\scratchpad'; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList '-m','uvicorn','app.main:app','--host','127.0.0.1','--port','6024' -RedirectStandardError "$sp\\api_err.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "$sp\\api_out.log" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id | ForEach-Object { "uvicorn PID $_" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; "--- /api/health ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:6024/api/health' -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "FALLO: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:6024/api/jobs'; $jobs | Select-Object filename, status, duration_seconds, speaker_count, created_at | Format-List } catch { "backend no responde: $_" })
